CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[NewItemsTrans] AS
SELECT     Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, Total, Item_Discount, (Total - Item_Discount) AS ItemNet, Transaction_Type, SumQuantity
FROM         (SELECT     Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, Transaction_Type, SUM(Total1) AS Total, SUM(Item_Discount1) AS Item_Discount, SUM(Quantity) 
                                              AS SumQuantity
                        FROM         (SELECT     ItemsTrans.Item_ID, ItemsTrans.ItemCode, ItemsTrans.ItemName, (Quantity * Price) AS Total1, 
                                                                      'Item_Discount1' = CASE WHEN ItemDiscountType = 1 OR
                                                                      ItemDiscountType = 0 THEN 0 WHEN ItemDiscountType = 2 THEN (ItemDiscount) 
                                                                      WHEN ItemDiscountType = 3 THEN ((Quantity * Price) * (ItemDiscount / 100)) END, ItemsTrans.Transaction_Type, 
                                                                      ItemsTrans.Quantity
                                                FROM         ItemsTrans
                                                WHERE     Transaction_Type = 2) XTable
                        GROUP BY Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, Transaction_Type) YTable

create PROC [dbo].[Rebuild_ContractRevenue_ForPeriod]
(
    @StartDate date,
    @EndDate   date
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF @EndDate < @StartDate
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(N'EndDate لا يمكن أن يكون قبل StartDate',16,1);
        RETURN;
    END

    DECLARE @GlobalStart date = @StartDate;
    DECLARE @GlobalEnd   date = @EndDate;

    ---------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) مسح التوزيعات داخل الفترة من Details1
    ---------------------------------------------------
    DELETE FROM dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails1
    WHERE Installdate >= @GlobalStart
      AND Installdate <= @GlobalEnd;

    ---------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) لف على الشهور من أول الفترة لآخرها
    ---------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE @CurrentMonth date = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@GlobalStart), MONTH(@GlobalStart), 1);
    DECLARE @LastMonth    date = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@GlobalEnd),   MONTH(@GlobalEnd),   1);

    WHILE @CurrentMonth <= @LastMonth
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @FirstOfMonth date = @CurrentMonth;
        DECLARE @LastOfMonth  date = EOMONTH(@CurrentMonth);

        IF @FirstOfMonth < @GlobalStart SET @FirstOfMonth = @GlobalStart;
        IF @LastOfMonth  > @GlobalEnd   SET @LastOfMonth  = @GlobalEnd;

        ------------------------------------------------
        -- 3) TransID للشهر الحالي (لو مش موجود نخليه NULL)
        ------------------------------------------------
        DECLARE @TransID int = NULL;

        SELECT TOP 1 @TransID = TransID
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocations
        WHERE MONTH(FromDate) = MONTH(@CurrentMonth)
          AND YEAR(FromDate)  = YEAR(@CurrentMonth);

        ------------------------------------------------
        -- 4) تجهيز الأقساط:
        --    أ) أقساط اتعملها استحقاق سابق (Details)
        --    ب) + أول دفعة من كل عقد (لو مش متعملها استحقاق سابق)
        ------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH AllocatedInstallments AS
        (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                I.Id          AS InstallId,
                I.ContNo,
                I.InstallNo,
                I.Installdate AS StartDate,
                I.Countsofall,
                I.NoteSerial1,
                C.CusID,
                I.installValue,      -- ✅ مهم
                I.NetRent,
                I.RentValue,
                I.Commissions,
                I.Insurance,
                I.Water,
                I.Electric,
                I.TelandNet
            FROM dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails D
            INNER JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments I
                ON I.Id = D.Installid
            INNER JOIN dbo.TblContract C
                ON C.ContNo = I.ContNo
        ),
        FirstInstallments AS
        (
            SELECT 
                X.InstallId,
                X.ContNo,
                X.InstallNo,
                X.StartDate,
                X.Countsofall,
                X.NoteSerial1,
                X.CusID,
                X.installValue,      -- ✅ مهم
                X.NetRent,
                X.RentValue,
                X.Commissions,
                X.Insurance,
                X.Water,
                X.Electric,
                X.TelandNet
            FROM
            (
                SELECT 
                    I.Id          AS InstallId,
                    I.ContNo,
                    I.InstallNo,
                    I.Installdate AS StartDate,
                    I.Countsofall,
                    I.NoteSerial1,
                    C.CusID,
                    I.installValue,    -- ✅ مهم
                    I.NetRent,
                    I.RentValue,
                    I.Commissions,
                    I.Insurance,
                    I.Water,
                    I.Electric,
                    I.TelandNet,
                    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY I.ContNo ORDER BY I.Installdate, I.InstallNo) AS RN
                FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments I
                INNER JOIN dbo.TblContract C
                    ON C.ContNo = I.ContNo
            ) X
            WHERE X.RN = 1
              AND NOT EXISTS
              (
                  SELECT 1
                  FROM dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails D
                  WHERE D.Installid = X.InstallId
              )
        ),
        AllInstallments AS
        (
            SELECT 
                A.InstallId,
                A.ContNo,
                A.InstallNo,
                A.StartDate,
                A.Countsofall,
                A.NoteSerial1,
                A.CusID,
                A.installValue,
                A.NetRent,
                A.RentValue,
                A.Commissions,
                A.Insurance,
                A.Water,
                A.Electric,
                A.TelandNet,
                C.EndDate AS ContractEndDate
            FROM
            (
                SELECT * FROM AllocatedInstallments
                UNION ALL
                SELECT * FROM FirstInstallments
            ) A
            INNER JOIN dbo.TblContract C
                ON C.ContNo = A.ContNo
        ),
        BasePeriod AS
        (
            SELECT
                A.*,
                NI.NextInstallStart,

				--Select NetRent,RentValue,* from TblContractInstallments where RentValue <> NetRent

    --            CASE 
    --                WHEN ISNULL(A.NetRent,0) <> 0 THEN ISNULL(A.NetRent,0)
    --                ELSE ISNULL(A.RentValue,0)
                ISNULL(A.RentValue,0) AS EffectiveRent,

                CASE
                    WHEN NI.NextInstallStart IS NOT NULL
                        THEN DATEADD(DAY,-1, NI.NextInstallStart)
                    WHEN A.ContractEndDate IS NOT NULL
                        THEN A.ContractEndDate
                    WHEN ISNULL(A.Countsofall,0) > 0
                        THEN DATEADD(DAY,-1, DATEADD(MONTH, A.Countsofall, A.StartDate))
                    ELSE A.StartDate
                END AS EndDate
            FROM AllInstallments A
            OUTER APPLY
            (
                SELECT MIN(I2.Installdate) AS NextInstallStart
                FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments I2
                WHERE I2.ContNo      = A.ContNo
                  AND I2.Installdate > A.StartDate
            ) NI
        ),
        WithPosted AS
        (
            SELECT
                B.*,

                ISNULL(P.PostedTotal,0)    AS PostedTotal,
                ISNULL(P.PostedRent,0)     AS PostedRent,
                ISNULL(P.PostedComm,0)     AS PostedComm,
                ISNULL(P.PostedIns,0)      AS PostedIns,
                ISNULL(P.PostedWater,0)    AS PostedWater,
                ISNULL(P.PostedElectric,0) AS PostedElectric,
                ISNULL(P.PostedTeland,0)   AS PostedTeland,
                P.PostedThroughDate,

                CASE
                    WHEN P.PostedThroughDate IS NOT NULL THEN DATEADD(DAY, 1, P.PostedThroughDate)
                    ELSE B.StartDate
                END AS RemainingStart,

                -- ✅ TotalValue من الدفعة فقط (وبديلها installValue لو البنود صفر)
                CASE 
                    WHEN (
                        ISNULL(B.EffectiveRent,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Commissions,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Water,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Electric,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.TelandNet,0)
                    ) > 0
                    THEN (
                        ISNULL(B.EffectiveRent,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Commissions,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Water,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.Electric,0)
                      + ISNULL(B.TelandNet,0)
                    )
                    ELSE ISNULL(B.installValue,0)
                END AS TotalValue
            FROM BasePeriod B
            OUTER APPLY
            (
                SELECT
                    PostedThroughDate = MAX(EOMONTH(D2.Installdate)),
                    PostedTotal    = SUM(ISNULL(D2.installValue,0)),
                    PostedRent     = SUM(ISNULL(D2.RentValue,0)),
                    PostedComm     = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Commissions,0)),
                    PostedIns      = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Insurance,0)),
                    PostedWater    = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Water,0)),
                    PostedElectric = SUM(ISNULL(D2.Electric,0)),
                    PostedTeland   = SUM(ISNULL(D2.TelandNet,0))
                FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 D2
                WHERE D2.Installid = B.InstallId
                  AND D2.Installdate >= B.StartDate
                  AND D2.Installdate <= B.EndDate
            ) P
        ),
        FinalPeriods AS
        (
            SELECT
                I.*,

                -- ✅ استبعاد أي دفعة قيمتها = 0 (ممنوع اختراع قيم)
                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(I.TotalValue,0) <= 0 THEN 0
                    WHEN I.EndDate IS NULL THEN 0
                    WHEN I.RemainingStart > I.EndDate THEN 0
                    ELSE DATEDIFF(DAY, I.RemainingStart, I.EndDate) + 1
                END AS RemainingDays,

                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(I.TotalValue,0) <= 0 THEN 0
                    WHEN (I.TotalValue - I.PostedTotal) < 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (I.TotalValue - I.PostedTotal)
                END AS RemainingTotal,

                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.EffectiveRent,0) - I.PostedRent) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.EffectiveRent,0) - I.PostedRent) END AS RemainingRent,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.Commissions,0)   - I.PostedComm) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.Commissions,0)   - I.PostedComm) END AS RemainingComm,
                0 AS RemainingIns,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.Water,0)         - I.PostedWater)< 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.Water,0)         - I.PostedWater)END AS RemainingWater,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.Electric,0)      - I.PostedElectric) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.Electric,0)  - I.PostedElectric) END AS RemainingElectric,
                CASE WHEN (ISNULL(I.TelandNet,0)     - I.PostedTeland) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (ISNULL(I.TelandNet,0)   - I.PostedTeland) END AS RemainingTeland
            FROM WithPosted I
        ),
        Overlapping AS
        (
            SELECT *
            FROM FinalPeriods I
            WHERE I.EndDate IS NOT NULL
              AND I.RemainingDays > 0
              AND I.RemainingTotal > 0     -- ✅ لازم يبقى في فلوس فعلًا
              AND I.RemainingStart <= @LastOfMonth
              AND I.EndDate        >= @FirstOfMonth
        ),
        MonthPortions AS
        (
            SELECT
                I.*,
                CASE 
                    WHEN I.RemainingStart > @FirstOfMonth THEN I.RemainingStart
                    ELSE @FirstOfMonth
                END AS PeriodStart,
                CASE
                    WHEN I.EndDate < @LastOfMonth THEN I.EndDate
                    ELSE @LastOfMonth
                END AS PeriodEnd
            FROM Overlapping I
        )
        INSERT INTO dbo.TblContractInsAllocationsDetails1
        (
            TransID,
            InstallNo,
            NoteSerial,
            Installid,
            Installdate,
            InstalldateH,
            CusID,
            installValue,
            RentValue,
            Commissions,
            Insurance,
            Water,
            Electric,
            TelandNet,
            allocations,
            Countsofall,
            Doneofall
        )
        SELECT
            @TransID                                       AS TransID,
            M.InstallNo,
            M.NoteSerial1                                  AS NoteSerial,
            M.InstallId                                    AS Installid,
            M.PeriodStart                                  AS Installdate,
            CONVERT(varchar(10), M.PeriodStart, 131)       AS InstalldateH,
            M.CusID,

            ROUND( (M.RemainingTotal / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS installValue,

            ROUND( (M.RemainingRent  / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS RentValue,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingComm  / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS Commissions,
            0 AS Insurance,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingWater / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS Water,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingElectric / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS Electric,
            ROUND( (M.RemainingTeland / M.RemainingDays) * (DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1), 2 ) AS TelandNet,

            0                                             AS allocations,
            M.Countsofall,
            0                                             AS Doneofall
        FROM MonthPortions M
        WHERE DATEDIFF(DAY, M.PeriodStart, M.PeriodEnd) + 1 > 0
          AND M.RemainingDays > 0
          AND M.RemainingTotal > 0;

        SET @CurrentMonth = DATEADD(MONTH, 1, @CurrentMonth);
    END
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.Rpt_Aging_VBStyle
(
    @AsOfDate       DATE,
    @IsCustomer     BIT = 1,       -- 1 = عملاء ، 0 = موردين
    @BranchId       INT = NULL,
    @CusId          INT = NULL,
    @CusIdList      NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL,
    @ClassId        INT = NULL,
    @CustomerTypeId INT = NULL,
    @EmpId          INT = NULL
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- فك ليستة العملاء/الموردين
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE @CusList TABLE (CusID INT);
    IF @CusIdList IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(@CusIdList)) <> ''
    BEGIN
        DECLARE @p INT = 1, @l INT = LEN(@CusIdList), @c INT, @v NVARCHAR(50);
        WHILE @p <= @l
        BEGIN
            SET @c = CHARINDEX(',', @CusIdList, @p);
            IF @c = 0 SET @c = @l + 1;

            SET @v = SUBSTRING(@CusIdList, @p, @c - @p);
            IF LTRIM(RTRIM(@v)) <> ''
                INSERT INTO @CusList VALUES (CAST(@v AS INT));

            SET @p = @c + 1;
        END
    END

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- نجمع كل الحركات في جدول مؤقت واحد
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Src') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE #Src;

    SELECT
        dev.Account_Code,
        acc.Account_Name              AS CusName,
        c.CusID,
        dev.branch_id                 AS BranchID,
        br.branch_name,
        n.NoteId,
        n.NoteSerial,
        n.NoteSerial1,
        n.NoteType,
        n.NoteDate,
        ISNULL(dev.DueDate, n.NoteDate) AS DueDate,
        ISNULL(tnt.NotesTypeName, N'قيد افتتاحي') AS TransactionTypeName,
        dbo.GetDeptAgeID(DATEDIFF(DAY, ISNULL(dev.DueDate, n.NoteDate), @AsOfDate)) AS AgeID,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, ISNULL(dev.DueDate, n.NoteDate), @AsOfDate) AS DiffDate,
        dev.[Value]                   AS TransNet,
        dev.Credit_Or_Debit,

        -- المندوب
        e.Emp_ID,
        e.Emp_Code,
        e.Emp_Name AS Emp_Name
    INTO #Src
    FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS dev
        INNER JOIN dbo.Notes n ON n.NoteId = dev.Notes_ID
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblNotesTypes tnt ON tnt.NotesType = n.NoteType
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblCustemers  c   ON c.Account_Code = dev.Account_Code
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS      acc ON acc.Account_Code = dev.Account_Code
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br ON br.branch_id = dev.branch_id
        -- ربط الفاتورة بالمندوب
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.Transactions  tr ON tr.NoteId      = n.noteid
                                       
                                       
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblEmployee   e  ON e.Emp_ID            = tr.Emp_ID
    WHERE dev.Posted IS NULL
      AND n.NoteDate <= @AsOfDate
      AND ISNULL(dev.[Value],0) <> 0
      AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR dev.branch_id = @BranchId)
      AND (@CusId    IS NULL OR c.CusID = @CusId)
      AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @CusList) OR c.CusID IN (SELECT CusID FROM @CusList))
      AND (@EmpId IS NULL OR e.Emp_ID = @EmpId)   -- فلتر المندوب

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        dev.Account_Code,
        acc.Account_Name,
        c.CusID,
        dev.branch_id,
        br.branch_name,
        n1.NoteId,
        n1.NoteSerial,
        n1.NoteSerial1,
        n1.NoteType,
        n1.NoteDate,
        ISNULL(dev.DueDate, n1.NoteDate),
        ISNULL(tnt.NotesTypeName, N'قيد افتتاحي'),
        dbo.GetDeptAgeID(DATEDIFF(DAY, ISNULL(dev.DueDate, n1.NoteDate), @AsOfDate)),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, ISNULL(dev.DueDate, n1.NoteDate), @AsOfDate),
        dev.[Value],
        dev.Credit_Or_Debit,

        -- المندوب للجزء التانى أيضًا
        e2.Emp_ID,
        e2.Emp_Code,
        e2.Emp_Name AS Emp_Name
    FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 dev
        INNER JOIN dbo.Notes1 n1 ON n1.NoteId = dev.Notes_ID
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblNotesTypes tnt ON tnt.NotesType = n1.NoteType
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblCustemers  c   ON c.Account_Code = dev.Account_Code
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS      acc ON acc.Account_Code = dev.Account_Code
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br ON br.branch_id = dev.branch_id
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.Transactions  tr2 ON tr2.NoteId      = n1.NoteID
                                        
                                        
        LEFT  JOIN dbo.TblEmployee   e2  ON e2.Emp_ID            = tr2.Emp_ID
    WHERE dev.Posted IS NULL
      AND n1.NoteDate <= @AsOfDate
      AND ISNULL(dev.[Value],0) <> 0
      AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR dev.branch_id = @BranchId)
      AND (@CusId    IS NULL OR c.CusID = @CusId)
      AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM @CusList) OR c.CusID IN (SELECT CusID FROM @CusList))
      AND (@EmpId IS NULL OR e2.Emp_ID = @EmpId);

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- نحدد الناحيتين حسب عميل/مورد
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    DECLARE @InvoiceSide INT = CASE WHEN @IsCustomer = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END;  -- الفواتير
    DECLARE @PaySide     INT = CASE WHEN @IsCustomer = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;  -- السداد

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) الجدول الأول: الفواتير بالتفاصيل
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        NULL AS id,
        NULL AS RecordDate,
        s.DueDate,
        NULL AS DueDate2,
        s.Account_Code,
        s.NoteSerial1,
        s.CusName,
        s.TransactionTypeName,
        s.DiffDate,
        NULL AS TransactionTypeName2,
        NULL AS Balance,
        NULL AS TransNetGrid2,
        s.TransNet,
        0   AS PayedValue,
        s.TransNet AS StillAmount,
        NULL AS Transaction_Type,
        s.AgeID,
        s.CusID,
        s.Credit_Or_Debit,
        s.BranchID,
        NULL AS UserID,
        s.NoteSerial,
        ag.[Name],
        ag.[From],
        ag.[To],
        ag.Color,
        s.NoteType,
        NULL AS ItemId,
        NULL AS TypeTrans,
        0    AS IsDeleted,
        s.branch_name,
        NULL AS Transaction_ID,
        NULL AS InvoiceType,
        -- هنا المندوب بدل NULL
        s.Emp_ID,
        s.Emp_Code,
        s.Emp_Name
    FROM #Src s
    INNER JOIN dbo.Ageng_type ag ON ag.Id = s.AgeID
    WHERE s.Credit_Or_Debit = @InvoiceSide
    ORDER BY s.Account_Code, s.DueDate, s.NoteSerial, s.NoteSerial1;

    ------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) الجدول التاني: السداد مُجمَّع على مستوى الحساب
    ------------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        NULL AS id,
        NULL AS RecordDate,
        NULL AS DueDate,
        NULL AS DueDate2,
        s.Account_Code,
        NULL AS NoteSerial1,
        MAX(s.CusName) AS CusName,
        NULL AS TransactionTypeName,
        NULL AS DiffDate,
        NULL AS TransactionTypeName2,
        NULL AS Balance,
        NULL AS TransNetGrid2,

        SUM(s.TransNet) AS TransNet,          -- إجمالي السداد
        SUM(s.TransNet) AS PayedValue,        -- نفس الإجمالي للانسجام مع الكود القديم
        SUM(s.TransNet) AS StillAmount,       -- زيه برضه (لو الكود يلمسه)

        NULL AS Transaction_Type,
        NULL AS AgeID,
        MAX(s.CusID) AS CusID,
        @PaySide      AS Credit_Or_Debit,
        MIN(s.BranchID) AS BranchID,
        NULL AS UserID,
        NULL AS NoteSerial,
        NULL AS [Name],
        NULL AS [From],
        NULL AS [To],
        NULL AS Color,
        NULL AS NoteType,
        NULL AS ItemId,
        NULL AS TypeTrans,
        0    AS IsDeleted,
        MIN(s.branch_name) AS branch_name,
        NULL AS Transaction_ID,
        NULL AS InvoiceType,
        -- المندوب فى السطر المجمع
        MAX(s.Emp_ID)    AS Emp_ID,
        MAX(s.Emp_Code)  AS Emp_Code,
        MAX(s.Emp_Name) AS Emp_Name
    FROM #Src s
    WHERE s.Credit_Or_Debit = @PaySide
    GROUP BY s.Account_Code
    ORDER BY s.Account_Code;

END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[Rpt_ContractRevenueDetails]
    @FromDate   DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate     DATETIME = NULL,
    @BranchId   INT      = NULL,
    @AqarTypeId INT      = NULL,
    @ClientId   INT      = NULL,
    @OwnerId    INT      = NULL,
    @ContractNo INT      = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @ToDateEnd DATETIME = CASE WHEN @ToDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate) END;

    ;WITH
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) إجمالى قيمة العقد (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    InstallAgg AS (
        SELECT
            ContNo,
            SUM(ISNULL(installValue,0) - ISNULL(Insurance,0)) AS TotalContract
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) أول قسط لكل عقد (Fallback)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    FirstInstallPerContract AS (
        SELECT ContNo, MIN(Installdate) AS FirstInstDate
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),
    FirstInstallFallback AS (
        SELECT
            c.ContNo,
            fi.Id AS InstallId,
            fi.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(fi.installValue,0) - ISNULL(fi.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.TblContract c
        JOIN FirstInstallPerContract fp ON fp.ContNo = c.ContNo
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments fi
             ON fi.ContNo = fp.ContNo
            AND fi.Installdate = fp.FirstInstDate
        LEFT JOIN dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d ON d.InstallId = fi.Id
        WHERE ISNULL(c.NoteID,0) <> 0      -- له قيد
          AND d.InstallId IS NULL          -- ومفيش استحقاق لأول دفعة
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) مصدر المستحق (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    DueBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.InstallId = i.Id

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            f.ContNo,
            f.InstallId,
            f.Installdate,
            f.installValue
        FROM FirstInstallFallback f
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) مصدر الإيراد (Net بدون تأمين) - بدون اشتراط وجود مستحق
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    RevBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.Installid AS InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.Installid = i.Id
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) الأقساط “الصالحة” (لها مستحق أو Fallback أو لها إيراد)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ValidInstallments AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT InstallId FROM DueBase
        UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT InstallId FROM RevBase
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 6) الأقساط التي تاريخها الأصلي داخل الفترة (أساس التقرير التفصيلي)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    InstallmentsInRange AS (
        SELECT
            i.Id AS InstallId,
            i.ContNo
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments i
        JOIN ValidInstallments v ON v.InstallId = i.Id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR i.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR i.Installdate <= @ToDate)
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 7) العقود التي لها أقساط داخل الفترة (عشان نطلع Opening صحيح لنفس الدفعات)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ContractsInRange AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT ContNo FROM InstallmentsInRange
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 8) Due Before / Period على مستوى القسط (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    DueBefore AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DueBefore
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND d.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),
    DuePeriod AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DuePeriod
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 9) Rev Before / Period على مستوى القسط (Net بدون تأمين)
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    RevBefore AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS RevBefore
        FROM RevBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND d.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    ),
    RevPeriod AS (
        SELECT d.InstallId, SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS RevPeriod
        FROM RevBase d
        JOIN InstallmentsInRange ir ON ir.InstallId = d.InstallId
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
        GROUP BY d.InstallId
    )

		,GLTotals AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a80 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS RentDue_GL,
        SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a86 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS Revenue_GL
    FROM dbo.notes n
    INNER JOIN dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS dv 
        ON dv.Notes_ID = n.NoteID
    INNER JOIN dbo.branches b 
        ON b.branch_id = n.branch_no
    WHERE n.NoteType = 57
      AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR n.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR n.NoteDate < @ToDateEnd)
      AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR n.branch_no = @BranchId)
)

    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- 10) النتيجة النهائية: صف واحد لكل قسط داخل الفترة
    -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        c.ContNo,
        c.NoteSerial1,

        i.Id AS InstallId,
        i.Installdate AS InstallDate,

        -- قيمة القسط المعروضة (Net بدون التأمين)
        (ISNULL(i.installValue,0) - ISNULL(i.Insurance,0)) AS InstallNetValue,
        i.NoteSerial1H,

        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) AS DueBefore,
        ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS RevenueBefore,
        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) - ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS OpeningNet,

        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) AS DueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS RevenueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) - ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS PeriodNet,

        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0)) AS DueToDate,
        (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS RevenueToDate,
        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0))
          - (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS ClosingNet,

        ia.TotalContract,

        c.ContDate,
        cu.CusName,
        cu.CusNamee,
        ow.CusName AS OwnerName,
        ow.CusNamee AS OwnerNameE,
        br.branch_name,
        br.branch_namee,
        aq.aqarname,
        aqD.unitno,
			 gl.RentDue_GL,
    gl.Revenue_GL,
    (ISNULL(gl.RentDue_GL,0) - ISNULL(gl.Revenue_GL,0)) AS GL_NetDifference
    FROM InstallmentsInRange ir
    JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON i.Id = ir.InstallId
    JOIN dbo.TblContract c ON c.ContNo = i.ContNo
    JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN InstallAgg ia ON ia.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN DueBefore db ON db.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN DuePeriod dp ON dp.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN RevBefore rb ON rb.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN RevPeriod rp ON rp.InstallId = i.Id
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers cu ON cu.CusID = c.CusID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqar aq ON aq.Aqarid = c.Iqar
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai aqD ON aqD.Id = c.UnitNo
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers ow ON ow.CusID = aq.ownerid
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br ON br.branch_id = aq.BranchId
		CROSS JOIN GLTotals gl
    WHERE 1=1
      AND (@BranchId   IS NULL OR aq.BranchId   = @BranchId)
      AND (@AqarTypeId IS NULL OR aq.Aqarid = @AqarTypeId)  -- ✅ التصحيح المهم
      AND (@ClientId   IS NULL OR c.CusID       = @ClientId)
      AND (@OwnerId    IS NULL OR aq.ownerid    = @OwnerId)
      AND (@ContractNo IS NULL OR c.ContNo      = @ContractNo)

    ORDER BY c.ContNo, i.Installdate, i.Id;
END

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[Rpt_ContractRevenueSummary]
    @FromDate   DATETIME = NULL,
    @ToDate     DATETIME = NULL,
    @BranchId   INT      = NULL,
    @AqarTypeId INT      = NULL,
    @ClientId   INT      = NULL,
    @OwnerId    INT      = NULL,
    @ContractNo INT      = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @ToDateEnd DATETIME = CASE WHEN @ToDate IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEADD(DAY,1,@ToDate) END;

    ;WITH
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) إجمالى قيمة العقد من الأقساط (Net بدون التأمين)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    InstallAgg AS (
        SELECT
            ContNo,
            SUM(ISNULL(installValue,0) - ISNULL(Insurance,0)) AS TotalContract
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) أول قسط لكل عقد (Fallback)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    FirstInstallPerContract AS (
        SELECT ContNo, MIN(Installdate) AS FirstInstDate
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments
        GROUP BY ContNo
    ),
    FirstInstallFallback AS (
        SELECT
            c.ContNo,
            fi.Id AS InstallId,
            fi.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(fi.installValue,0) - ISNULL(fi.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.TblContract c
        JOIN FirstInstallPerContract fp ON fp.ContNo = c.ContNo
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments fi
             ON fi.ContNo = fp.ContNo
            AND fi.Installdate = fp.FirstInstDate
        LEFT JOIN dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d ON d.InstallId = fi.Id
        WHERE ISNULL(c.NoteID,0) <> 0
          AND d.InstallId IS NULL
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) مصدر الاستحقاق (استحقاقات + Fallback) Net بدون التأمين
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    DueBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.InstallId = i.Id

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            f.ContNo,
            f.InstallId,
            f.Installdate,
            f.installValue
        FROM FirstInstallFallback f
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) مصدر الإيراد (إثبات الإيراد) Net بدون التأمين
    --    *بدون اشتراط وجود مستحق*
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    RevBase AS (
        SELECT
            i.ContNo,
            d.Installid AS InstallId,
            d.Installdate,
            (ISNULL(d.installValue,0) - ISNULL(d.Insurance,0)) AS installValue
        FROM dbo.tblContractInsAllocationsDetails2 d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON d.Installid = i.Id
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) الدفعات الصحيحة للمستحق (استحقاق أو Fallback)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    ValidInstallments AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT InstallId
        FROM DueBase
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 6) العقود داخل نطاق التقرير:
    --    (أ) لها دفعة "مستحقة/صالحة" تاريخها الأصلي داخل الفترة
    --    أو
    --    (ب) لها إيراد داخل الفترة حتى لو مافيش مستحق
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    ContractsInRange AS (
        -- (أ) من الدفعات الصالحة تاريخها الأصلي داخل الفترة
        SELECT DISTINCT i.ContNo
        FROM dbo.TblContractInstallments i
        JOIN ValidInstallments v ON v.InstallId = i.Id
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR i.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR i.Installdate <= @ToDate)

        UNION

        -- (ب) من الإيرادات فقط (فلتر بتاريخ حركة الإيراد)
        SELECT DISTINCT r.ContNo
        FROM RevBase r
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR r.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR r.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 7) مستحقات سابقة على مستوى العقد (Opening Due)
    --    *فلتر بتاريخ حركة الاستحقاق فقط*
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    DueBeforeContract AS (
        SELECT
            d.ContNo,
            SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DueBefore
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = d.ContNo
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND d.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY d.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 8) مستحقات خلال الفترة على مستوى العقد (Period Due)
    --    *فلتر بتاريخ حركة الاستحقاق*
    --    + شرط تاريخ القسط الأصلي داخل الفترة (زي التفصيلي)
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    DuePeriodContract AS (
        SELECT
            d.ContNo,
            SUM(ISNULL(d.installValue,0)) AS DuePeriod
        FROM DueBase d
        JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments i ON i.Id = d.InstallId
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = d.ContNo
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR d.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR d.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
          AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR i.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDate   IS NULL OR i.Installdate <= @ToDate)
        GROUP BY d.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 9) إيرادات سابقة على مستوى العقد (Opening Rev)
    --    *فلتر بتاريخ حركة الإيراد فقط*
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    RevBeforeContract AS (
        SELECT
            r.ContNo,
            SUM(ISNULL(r.installValue,0)) AS RevBefore
        FROM RevBase r
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = r.ContNo
        WHERE @FromDate IS NOT NULL
          AND r.Installdate < @FromDate
        GROUP BY r.ContNo
    ),

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 10) إيرادات خلال الفترة على مستوى العقد (Period Rev)
    --     *فلتر بتاريخ حركة الإيراد فقط*
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    RevPeriodContract AS (
        SELECT
            r.ContNo,
            SUM(ISNULL(r.installValue,0)) AS RevPeriod
        FROM RevBase r
        JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = r.ContNo
        WHERE (@FromDate IS NULL OR r.Installdate >= @FromDate)
          AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR r.Installdate < @ToDateEnd)
        GROUP BY r.ContNo
    )

	,GLTotals AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a80 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS RentDue_GL,
        SUM(CASE WHEN dv.Account_Code = b.a86 THEN dv.Value ELSE 0 END) AS Revenue_GL
    FROM dbo.notes n
    INNER JOIN dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS dv 
        ON dv.Notes_ID = n.NoteID
    INNER JOIN dbo.branches b 
        ON b.branch_id = n.branch_no
    WHERE n.NoteType = 57
      AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR n.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
      AND (@ToDateEnd IS NULL OR n.NoteDate < @ToDateEnd)
      AND (@BranchId IS NULL OR n.branch_no = @BranchId)
)

    ---------------------------------------------------------
    -- 11) النتيجة النهائية: سطر واحد لكل عقد
    ---------------------------------------------------------
    SELECT
        c.ContNo,
        c.NoteSerial1,

        ISNULL(ia.TotalContract,0) AS TotalContract,

        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) AS DueBefore,
        ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS RevenueBefore,
        ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) - ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) AS OpeningNet,

        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) AS DueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS RevenueInPeriod,
        ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0) - ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0) AS PeriodNet,

        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0)) AS DueToDate,
        (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS RevenueToDate,
        (ISNULL(db.DueBefore,0) + ISNULL(dp.DuePeriod,0))
          - (ISNULL(rb.RevBefore,0) + ISNULL(rp.RevPeriod,0)) AS ClosingNet,

        c.ContDate,
        cu.CusName,
        cu.CusNamee,
        ow.CusName  AS OwnerName,
        ow.CusNamee AS OwnerNameE,
        br.branch_name,
        br.branch_namee,
        aq.aqarname,
        aqD.unitno,
		 gl.RentDue_GL,
    gl.Revenue_GL,
    (ISNULL(gl.RentDue_GL,0) - ISNULL(gl.Revenue_GL,0)) AS GL_NetDifference
    FROM dbo.TblContract c
    JOIN ContractsInRange cr ON cr.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN InstallAgg ia ON ia.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN DueBeforeContract db ON db.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN DuePeriodContract dp ON dp.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN RevBeforeContract rb ON rb.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN RevPeriodContract rp ON rp.ContNo = c.ContNo
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers cu ON cu.CusID = c.CusID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqar aq ON aq.Aqarid = c.Iqar
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai aqD ON aqD.Id = c.UnitNo
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers ow ON ow.CusID = aq.ownerid
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData br ON br.branch_id = aq.BranchId
	CROSS JOIN GLTotals gl
    WHERE 1=1
      AND (@BranchId   IS NULL OR aq.BranchId   = @BranchId)
      AND (@AqarTypeId IS NULL OR aq.Aqarid = @AqarTypeId)
      AND (@ClientId   IS NULL OR c.CusID       = @ClientId)
      AND (@OwnerId    IS NULL OR aq.ownerid    = @OwnerId)
      AND (@ContractNo IS NULL OR c.ContNo      = @ContractNo)
    ORDER BY c.ContNo;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.Rpt_ItemAging
(
      @FromDate     DATE
    , @ToDate       DATE
    , @GroupID      INT = 0
    , @Item_ID      INT = 0
    , @StoreID      INT = 0
    , @UpToTransID  BIGINT = 0
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF @FromDate IS NULL OR @ToDate IS NULL
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(N'FromDate and ToDate are required.',16,1);
        RETURN;
    END;

    IF @ToDate < @FromDate
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR(N'ToDate must be >= FromDate.',16,1);
        RETURN;
    END;

    DECLARE @AllowCostPerStore BIT = 0;
    DECLARE @CostStarting BIT = 0;
    DECLARE @FirstPeriodDateInthisYear DATE = '19900101';

    SELECT TOP (1)
        @AllowCostPerStore = CASE WHEN ISNULL(AllowCostPerStore,0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        @CostStarting      = CASE
                                WHEN ISNULL(CostStarting,0) = 1
                                  OR ISNULL(CostStartingGard,0) = 1
                                THEN 1 ELSE 0
                             END
    FROM dbo.TblOptions;

    SELECT
        @FirstPeriodDateInthisYear = ISNULL(MAX(OpeneingbalancesDate), '19900101')
    FROM dbo.TblyearsData
    WHERE CurrentYear = 1;

    ;WITH LastMove AS
    (
        SELECT
            TD.Item_ID,
            MAX(T.Transaction_Date) AS LastDate
        FROM dbo.Transaction_Details TD
        INNER JOIN dbo.Transactions T
            ON TD.Transaction_ID = T.Transaction_ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.TblItems I
            ON TD.Item_ID = I.ItemID
        WHERE T.Transaction_Type = 21
          AND T.Transaction_Date >= CAST(@FromDate AS DATETIME)
          AND T.Transaction_Date < DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(@ToDate AS DATETIME))
          AND ISNULL(I.ItemType,0) = 0
          AND (@GroupID = 0 OR I.GroupID = @GroupID)
          AND (@Item_ID = 0 OR TD.Item_ID = @Item_ID)
        GROUP BY TD.Item_ID
    ),
    StockAgg AS
    (
        SELECT
            TD.Item_ID,
            QtyBalance =
                SUM(ISNULL(TD.Quantity,0) * ISNULL(TT.StockEffect,0)),
            BalanceValue =
                SUM(ROUND(ISNULL(TD.Quantity,0) * ISNULL(TD.Price,0) * ISNULL(TT.StockEffect,0), 2))
        FROM dbo.Transaction_Details TD
        INNER JOIN dbo.Transactions T
            ON TD.Transaction_ID = T.Transaction_ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.TransactionTypes TT
            ON T.Transaction_Type = TT.Transaction_Type
        INNER JOIN dbo.TblItems I
            ON TD.Item_ID = I.ItemID
        WHERE ISNULL(TT.StockEffect,0) <> 0
          AND T.Transaction_Date < DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(@ToDate AS DATETIME))
          AND ISNULL(I.ItemType,0) = 0
          AND (@GroupID = 0 OR I.GroupID = @GroupID)
          AND (@Item_ID = 0 OR TD.Item_ID = @Item_ID)
        GROUP BY TD.Item_ID
    ),
    BaseItems AS
    (
        SELECT
            LM.Item_ID AS ItemId,
            LM.LastDate,
            DATEDIFF(DAY, LM.LastDate, @ToDate) AS DiffDays,
            ISNULL(SA.QtyBalance, 0) AS QtyBalance,
            ISNULL(SA.BalanceValue, 0) AS BalanceValue
        FROM LastMove LM
        LEFT JOIN StockAgg SA
            ON LM.Item_ID = SA.Item_ID
        WHERE ISNULL(SA.QtyBalance, 0) > 0.0001
    )
    SELECT
        B.ItemId,
        A.id AS LateID,
        I.ItemCode,
        I.ItemName,
        I.ItemNamee,
        A.Name,
        A.Namee,
        B.LastDate,
        B.DiffDays,

        CAST(B.QtyBalance AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS QtyBalance,
        CAST(B.BalanceValue AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS BalanceValue,

        -- متوسط تكلفة الوحدة
        CAST(ISNULL(CostData.AvCost, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS AvgCost,

        -- إجمالي تكلفة الرصيد الحالي = متوسط التكلفة * الرصيد
        CAST(ISNULL(CostData.AvCost, 0) * ISNULL(B.QtyBalance, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS TotalCost

    FROM BaseItems B
    INNER JOIN dbo.TblItems I
        ON B.ItemId = I.ItemID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AgengItem_type A
        ON B.DiffDays BETWEEN A.[from] AND A.[to]

    OUTER APPLY
    (
        SELECT
            MinDateRaw = MAX(X.Transaction_Date)
        FROM
        (
            SELECT
                T.Transaction_Date,
                BeforeQty = ISNULL(ROUND(dbo.GetItemqtytodate(T.Transaction_Date, TD.Item_ID, 0), 2), 0)
            FROM dbo.Transactions T
            INNER JOIN dbo.Transaction_Details TD
                ON T.Transaction_ID = TD.Transaction_ID
            INNER JOIN dbo.TransactionTypes TT
                ON T.Transaction_Type = TT.Transaction_Type
            WHERE TT.StockEffect = -1
              AND T.Transaction_Date <= DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(@ToDate AS DATETIME))
              AND TD.Item_ID = B.ItemId
              AND (@UpToTransID = 0 OR TD.Transaction_ID <> @UpToTransID)
            GROUP BY
                T.Transaction_Date,
                TD.Item_ID,
                ISNULL(ROUND(dbo.GetItemqtytodate(T.Transaction_Date, TD.Item_ID, 0), 2), 0)
        ) X
        WHERE X.BeforeQty = -1
    ) MinQ

    OUTER APPLY
    (
        SELECT
            CostFromDate =
                CASE
                    WHEN @CostStarting = 1 THEN @FirstPeriodDateInthisYear
                    WHEN MinQ.MinDateRaw IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(MinQ.MinDateRaw AS DATE)
                    ELSE CAST('19000101' AS DATE)
                END
    ) StartDateCalc

    OUTER APPLY
    (
        SELECT
            AvCost =
                CASE
                    WHEN @AllowCostPerStore = 1 THEN
                        (
                            SELECT TOP (1)
                                ROUND(ISNULL(QS.Total,0) / NULLIF(QS.TotalQty,0), 7)
                            FROM dbo.QryItemsTransactionsTotalsByStores
                            (
                                  28
                                , 3
                                , 20
                                , StartDateCalc.CostFromDate
                                , @ToDate
                                , @StoreID
                                , B.ItemId
                                , @UpToTransID
                            ) QS
                            WHERE QS.ItemID = B.ItemId
                              AND ISNULL(QS.TotalQty,0) <> 0
                        )
                    ELSE
                        (
                            SELECT TOP (1)
                                ROUND(ISNULL(Q.Total,0) / NULLIF(Q.TotalQty,0), 7)
                            FROM dbo.QryItemsTransactionsTotals
                            (
                                  28
                                , 3
                                , 20
                                , StartDateCalc.CostFromDate
                                , @ToDate
                                , B.ItemId
                                , @UpToTransID
                            ) Q
                            WHERE Q.ItemID = B.ItemId
                              AND ISNULL(Q.TotalQty,0) <> 0
                        )
                END
    ) CostData

    ORDER BY I.ItemCode;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.Rpt_StockReview_WithLastCountCutoff
(
      @StoreId   INT
    , @FromDate  DATE
    , @ToDate    DATE
    , @EmpId     INT = NULL
    , @GroupId   INT = NULL
    , @ItemId    INT = NULL
    , @ShowZero  BIT = 0
    , @IsFromNull BIT = 0
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF @FromDate IS NULL OR @ToDate IS NULL
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR('FromDate and ToDate are required.', 16, 1);
        RETURN;
    END;

    IF @ToDate < @FromDate
    BEGIN
        RAISERROR('ToDate must be >= FromDate.', 16, 1);
        RETURN;
    END;

    -- 0 = All stores (VB)
    SET @StoreId = NULLIF(@StoreId, 0);

    DECLARE @FromDateDT DATETIME = CAST(@FromDate AS DATETIME);
    DECLARE @ToDateEnd  DATETIME = DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(@ToDate AS DATETIME));

    ;WITH
    Opt AS
    (
        SELECT TOP (1)
            UseLastCount = CASE WHEN ISNULL(CostStartingGard,0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            TreatUncountedItemsAsZeroQty = CASE WHEN ISNULL(TreatUncountedItemsAsZeroQty,0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        FROM dbo.TblOptions
    ),
    GroupTree AS
    (
        SELECT g.GroupID
        FROM dbo.Groups g
        WHERE @GroupId IS NOT NULL
          AND g.GroupID = @GroupId

        UNION ALL

        SELECT g2.GroupID
        FROM dbo.Groups g2
        INNER JOIN GroupTree gt
            ON g2.ParentID = gt.GroupID
    ),
    FilterItems AS
    (
        SELECT i.ItemID, i.ItemCode, i.ItemName, i.GroupID
        FROM dbo.TblItems i
        WHERE (@ItemId IS NULL OR i.ItemID = @ItemId)
          AND (
                @GroupId IS NULL
                OR i.GroupID IN (SELECT GroupID FROM GroupTree)
              )
    ),

    /* =========================================================
       DefaultUnits: عامل التحويل للوحدة الافتراضية للصنف
       - كل الكميات في التقرير هتتعرَض بهذه الوحدة
       - القيم (Value) تظل كما هي لأنها مبنية على Base Quantity * Base Price
       ========================================================= */
    DefaultUnits AS
    (
        SELECT
            fi.ItemID,
            DefaultUnitID     = MAX(CASE WHEN ISNULL(iu.DefaultUnit,0) = 1 THEN iu.UnitID END),
            DefaultUnitFactor = MAX(CASE WHEN ISNULL(iu.DefaultUnit,0) = 1 THEN NULLIF(ISNULL(iu.UnitFactor,1),0) END)
        FROM FilterItems fi
        LEFT JOIN dbo.TblItemsUnits iu
            ON iu.ItemID = fi.ItemID
        GROUP BY fi.ItemID
    ),

    -- ===== TargetCountDate: لو مخزن محدد => للمخزن، لو NULL => عام لكل المخازن =====
    TargetCount AS
    (
        SELECT TargetCountDate =
            CAST(MAX(t.Transaction_Date) AS DATE)
        FROM dbo.Transactions t
        WHERE t.Transaction_Type = 30
          AND t.Transaction_Date < @FromDateDT
          AND (@StoreId IS NULL OR t.StoreID = @StoreId)
    ),
    -- ===== Stores scope =====
    StoresScope AS
    (
        SELECT s.StoreID
        FROM dbo.TblStore s
        WHERE @StoreId IS NULL OR s.StoreID = @StoreId
    ),
    -- ===== LastCount per (Store,Item) BUT only inside TargetCountDate window (no fallback to older counts) =====
    LastCount AS
    (
        SELECT
            ss.StoreID,
            fi.ItemID AS Item_ID,
            x.LastCountTransId,
            x.LastCountDate
        FROM StoresScope ss
        CROSS JOIN FilterItems fi
        CROSS JOIN TargetCount tc
        OUTER APPLY
        (
            SELECT TOP (1)
                t.Transaction_ID   AS LastCountTransId,
                t.Transaction_Date AS LastCountDate
            FROM dbo.Transactions t
            INNER JOIN dbo.Transaction_Details td
                ON td.Transaction_ID = t.Transaction_ID
            WHERE tc.TargetCountDate IS NOT NULL
              AND t.Transaction_Type = 30
              AND t.StoreID = ss.StoreID
              AND td.Item_ID = fi.ItemID
              AND t.Transaction_Date >= CAST(tc.TargetCountDate AS DATETIME)
              AND t.Transaction_Date <  DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(tc.TargetCountDate AS DATETIME))
            ORDER BY t.Transaction_Date DESC, t.Transaction_ID DESC
        ) x
    ),
    -- ===== ItemStart per (Store,Item) =====
    ItemStart AS
    (
        SELECT
            lc.StoreID,
            fi.ItemID AS Item_ID,
            fi.ItemCode,
            fi.ItemName,
            lc.LastCountDate,
            OpeningSource =
                CASE
                    WHEN o.UseLastCount = 1 AND lc.LastCountTransId IS NOT NULL THEN 'COUNT'
                    WHEN o.UseLastCount = 1 AND lc.LastCountTransId IS NULL AND o.TreatUncountedItemsAsZeroQty = 1 THEN 'ZERO'
                    ELSE 'HISTORICAL'
                END,
            StartDate =
                CASE
                    WHEN o.UseLastCount = 1 AND lc.LastCountTransId IS NOT NULL THEN lc.LastCountDate
                    WHEN o.UseLastCount = 1 AND lc.LastCountTransId IS NULL AND o.TreatUncountedItemsAsZeroQty = 1 THEN @FromDateDT
                    ELSE CAST('19000101' AS DATETIME)
                END
        FROM FilterItems fi
        CROSS JOIN Opt o
        INNER JOIN LastCount lc
            ON lc.Item_ID = fi.ItemID
    ),

    -- ===== Movements (StockEffect<>0) per store scope =====
    Movements AS
    (
        SELECT
            t.StoreID,
            td.Item_ID,
            t.Transaction_Date,
            tt.StockEffect,

            -- عامل التحويل للوحدة الافتراضية للصنف
            DefaultFactor = ISNULL(du.DefaultUnitFactor, 1),

            QtyBase    = ISNULL(td.Quantity,0), -- Base Qty
            ValBase    = ROUND(ISNULL(td.Quantity,0) * ISNULL(td.Price,0) * ISNULL(tt.StockEffect,0), 2)
        FROM dbo.Transactions t
        INNER JOIN dbo.TransactionTypes tt
            ON tt.Transaction_Type = t.Transaction_Type
        INNER JOIN dbo.Transaction_Details td
            ON td.Transaction_ID = t.Transaction_ID
        INNER JOIN FilterItems fi
            ON fi.ItemID = td.Item_ID
        LEFT JOIN DefaultUnits du
            ON du.ItemID = td.Item_ID
        WHERE ISNULL(tt.StockEffect,0) <> 0
          AND (@StoreId IS NULL OR t.StoreID = @StoreId)
          AND (
                @EmpId IS NULL
                OR (
                      t.Emp_ID = @EmpId
                  AND (t.nots IS NULL OR t.nots = '')
                   )
              )
    ),

    -- ===== Opening from COUNT سند واحد فقط per (Store,Item) =====
    InventoryCountOpening AS
    (
        SELECT
            lc.StoreID,
            lc.Item_ID,

            -- عرض الرصيد بوحدة الصنف الافتراضية
            OpenQty = SUM(ISNULL(td.Quantity,0)) / NULLIF(ISNULL(du.DefaultUnitFactor,1),0),

            -- القيمة تظل BaseQty * BasePrice (لا تغيير)
            OpenVal = SUM(ISNULL(td.Quantity,0) * ISNULL(td.Price,0))
        FROM LastCount lc
        INNER JOIN dbo.Transaction_Details td
            ON td.Transaction_ID = lc.LastCountTransId
           AND td.Item_ID = lc.Item_ID
        LEFT JOIN DefaultUnits du
            ON du.ItemID = lc.Item_ID
        WHERE lc.LastCountTransId IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY lc.StoreID, lc.Item_ID, du.DefaultUnitFactor
    ),

    -- ===== Classified per (Store,Item) =====
    Classified AS
    (
        SELECT
            s.StoreID,
            s.Item_ID,
            s.ItemCode,
            s.ItemName,
            s.LastCountDate,
            s.OpeningSource,

            OpenQtySigned =
                CASE
                    WHEN m.Transaction_Date >=
                        CASE
                            WHEN s.OpeningSource = 'COUNT' AND s.LastCountDate IS NOT NULL
                                THEN DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(s.LastCountDate AS DATE)) -- exclude count day
                            ELSE s.StartDate
                        END
                     AND m.Transaction_Date < @FromDateDT
                    THEN (m.QtyBase / NULLIF(m.DefaultFactor,0)) * m.StockEffect
                    ELSE 0
                END,

            OpenValSigned =
                CASE
                    WHEN m.Transaction_Date >=
                        CASE
                            WHEN s.OpeningSource = 'COUNT' AND s.LastCountDate IS NOT NULL
                                THEN DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(s.LastCountDate AS DATE)) -- exclude count day
                            ELSE s.StartDate
                        END
                     AND m.Transaction_Date < @FromDateDT
                    THEN m.ValBase
                    ELSE 0
                END,

            InQty =
                CASE WHEN m.Transaction_Date >= @FromDateDT
                      AND m.Transaction_Date <  @ToDateEnd
                      AND m.StockEffect = 1
                     THEN (m.QtyBase / NULLIF(m.DefaultFactor,0))
                     ELSE 0 END,

            OutQty =
                CASE WHEN m.Transaction_Date >= @FromDateDT
                      AND m.Transaction_Date <  @ToDateEnd
                      AND m.StockEffect = -1
                     THEN (m.QtyBase / NULLIF(m.DefaultFactor,0))
                     ELSE 0 END,

            InVal =
                CASE WHEN m.Transaction_Date >= @FromDateDT
                      AND m.Transaction_Date <  @ToDateEnd
                      AND m.StockEffect = 1
                     THEN m.ValBase
                     ELSE 0 END,

            OutVal =
                CASE WHEN m.Transaction_Date >= @FromDateDT
                      AND m.Transaction_Date <  @ToDateEnd
                      AND m.StockEffect = -1
                     THEN m.ValBase
                     ELSE 0 END
        FROM ItemStart s
        LEFT JOIN Movements m
            ON m.StoreID = s.StoreID
           AND m.Item_ID = s.Item_ID
    ),

    -- ===== Agg per (Store,Item) =====
    AggStore AS
    (
        SELECT
            StoreID,
            Item_ID,
            MAX(LastCountDate) AS LastCountDate,
            MAX(OpeningSource) AS OpeningSource,
            MAX(ItemCode) AS ItemCode,
            MAX(ItemName) AS ItemName,

            SUM(InQty)  AS QtyIn,
            SUM(InVal)  AS ValueIn,
            SUM(OpenQtySigned) AS OpenQtySignedSum,
            SUM(OpenValSigned) AS OpenValSignedSum,
            SUM(OutQty) AS QtyOut,
            SUM(OutVal) AS ValueOut
        FROM Classified
        GROUP BY StoreID, Item_ID
    ),

    -- ===== Final Agg per Item (لو @StoreId NULL يبقى تجميع كل المخازن) =====
    AggItem AS
    (
        SELECT
            a.Item_ID,

            LastCountDate = MAX(a.LastCountDate),

            OpeningSource =
                CASE
                    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN a.OpeningSource = 'COUNT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'COUNT'
                    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN a.OpeningSource = 'ZERO'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'ZERO'
                    ELSE 'HISTORICAL'
                END,

            ItemCode = MAX(a.ItemCode),
            ItemName = MAX(a.ItemName),

            QtyIn  = SUM(a.QtyIn),
            ValueIn= SUM(a.ValueIn),

            OpenQtySignedSum = SUM(a.OpenQtySignedSum),
            OpenValSignedSum = SUM(a.OpenValSignedSum),

            QtyOut = SUM(a.QtyOut),
            ValueOut = SUM(a.ValueOut)
        FROM AggStore a
        GROUP BY a.Item_ID
    ),

    ICO_Item AS
    (
        SELECT
            Item_ID,
            OpenQty = SUM(OpenQty),
            OpenVal = SUM(OpenVal)
        FROM InventoryCountOpening
        GROUP BY Item_ID
    )

    SELECT
        a.Item_ID,
        a.LastCountDate,
        a.OpeningSource,

        QtyIn   = CASE WHEN @IsFromNull = 1
                       THEN (a.QtyIn - ISNULL(a.OpenQtySignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenQty,0),0))
                       ELSE a.QtyIn END,

        ValueIn = CASE WHEN @IsFromNull = 1
                       THEN (a.ValueIn - ISNULL(a.OpenValSignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenVal,0),0))
                       ELSE a.ValueIn END,

        TotalQtyOpen = (a.OpenQtySignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenQty,0)),
        ValueOp      = (a.OpenValSignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenVal,0)),

        Totals = (a.OpenValSignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenVal,0)),
        Total  = (a.OpenValSignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenVal,0)),

        a.QtyOut,
        a.ValueOut,

        a.ItemCode,
        a.ItemName
    FROM AggItem a
    LEFT JOIN ICO_Item ic
        ON ic.Item_ID = a.Item_ID
    WHERE
        @ShowZero = 1
        OR
        (
               ABS(a.OpenQtySignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenQty,0)) > 0
            OR ABS(a.OpenValSignedSum + ISNULL(ic.OpenVal,0)) > 0
            OR ABS(a.QtyIn)  > 0
            OR ABS(a.ValueIn)  > 0
            OR ABS(a.QtyOut) > 0
            OR ABS(a.ValueOut) > 0
        )
    ORDER BY a.ItemCode
    OPTION (MAXRECURSION 32767);

END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.Sp_AqarSalesCommissionReports
    @GroupID int = NULL,
    @BranchID int = NULL,
    @IqarID int = NULL,
    @EmpID int = NULL,
    @UnitTypeID int = NULL,
    @UnitID int = NULL,
    @TypeAmount int = NULL,
    @FromDate datetime = NULL,
    @ToDate datetime = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    ;WITH PayScope AS
    (
        SELECT
            PayLine2.istallid,
            SUM(PayLine2.[Value]) AS ScopeValue
        FROM dbo.ContracttBillInstallmentsDone AS PayLine2
        INNER JOIN dbo.Notes AS PayNotes
            ON PayLine2.NoteID = PayNotes.NoteID
        WHERE (@BranchID IS NULL OR PayNotes.branch_no = @BranchID)
            AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR PayNotes.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
            AND (@ToDate IS NULL OR PayNotes.NoteDate <= @ToDate)
        GROUP BY PayLine2.istallid
    ),
    ContractPay AS
    (
        SELECT
            PayLine.NoteID,
            PayLine.InstallNo,
            MIN(PayLine.istallid) AS istallid,
            SUM(PayLine.[Value]) AS [Value],
            MAX(PayScope.ScopeValue) AS ScopeValue,
            SUM(PayLine.RentValuePayed) AS RentValuePayed,
            SUM(PayLine.CommissionsPayed) AS CommissionsPayed
        FROM dbo.ContracttBillInstallmentsDone AS PayLine
        LEFT OUTER JOIN PayScope
            ON PayScope.istallid = PayLine.istallid
        GROUP BY PayLine.NoteID, PayLine.InstallNo
    )
    SELECT
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ID) AS ID,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.PymentNo,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeOper,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.FilterNo) AS FilterNo,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.NoteID) AS NoteID,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeAmount,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Remarks) AS Remarks,
        MAX(CAST(ISNULL(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ReVal, 0) AS int)) AS ReVal,
        MAX(CAST(ISNULL(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Canceel, 0) AS int)) AS Canceel,
        SUM(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Amount) AS Amount,
        MAX(CAST(ISNULL(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Crosses, 0) AS int)) AS Crosses,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ContNo,
        MAX(CAST(ISNULL(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Flage, 0) AS int)) AS Flage,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.EmpID,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarDetai.unitno) AS unitno,
        MIN(dbo.TblAkarUnit.name) AS name,
        MIN(dbo.TblAkarUnit.namee) AS namee,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarDetai.Aqarid) AS Aqarid,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqar.aqarname) AS aqarname,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name) AS Emp_Name,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code) AS Emp_Code,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name1) AS Emp_Name1,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name2) AS Emp_Name2,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name3) AS Emp_Name3,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name4) AS Emp_Name4,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Fullcode) AS Fullcode,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee4) AS Emp_Namee4,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee3) AS Emp_Namee3,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee2) AS Emp_Namee2,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee1) AS Emp_Namee1,
        MIN(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee) AS Emp_Namee,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteDate) AS NoteDate,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteSerial) AS NoteSerial,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteSerial1) AS NoteSerial1,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteDateH) AS NoteDateH,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.branch_no) AS branch_no,
        MIN(dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_name) AS branch_name,
        MIN(dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_namee) AS branch_namee,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.CusID) AS CusID,
        MIN(dbo.TblCustemers.CusName) AS CusName,
        MIN(dbo.TblCustemers.CusNamee) AS CusNamee,
        MIN(dbo.TblAqrEarnest.CoustomerName) AS CoustomerName,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepData.GroupID) AS GroupID,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.name) AS Expr1,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.namee) AS Expr2,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Rent) AS Rent,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.InternalComm) AS InternalComm,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.ExternalComm) AS ExternalComm,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Revenue) AS Revenue,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.TypeiD) AS TypeiD,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Rent1) AS Rent1,
        CASE
            WHEN ISNULL(MAX(ContractPay.istallid), 0) <> 0
                THEN MAX(ISNULL(ContractPay.ScopeValue, ContractPay.[Value]))
            ELSE SUM(ISNULL(dbo.Notes.Note_Value2, 0))
        END AS Note_Value2,
        CASE
            WHEN ISNULL(MAX(ContractPay.istallid), 0) <> 0
                THEN MAX(ISNULL(ContractPay.ScopeValue, ContractPay.[Value]))
            ELSE SUM(ISNULL(dbo.Notes.Note_Value, 0))
        END AS Note_Value,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.InternalComm1) AS InternalComm1,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.ExternalComm1) AS ExternalComm1,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.[Count]) AS [Count],
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.DMY) AS DMY,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Revenuee) AS Revenuee,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.ManulaNO) AS ManulaNO,
        MIN(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Revenuee1) AS Revenuee1,
        MAX(CAST(ISNULL(dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.GCom, 0) AS int)) AS GCom,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.ChqueNum) AS ChqueNum,
        (SELECT MIN(SelectedNote.DueDate) FROM dbo.Notes AS SelectedNote WHERE SelectedNote.NoteID = MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteID)) AS DueDate,
        (SELECT MIN(SelectedNote.DueDate) FROM dbo.Notes AS SelectedNote WHERE SelectedNote.NoteID = MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteID)) AS DtpChequeDueDate,
        STUFF((
            SELECT DISTINCT ' - ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), DueNotes.DueDate, 111)
            FROM dbo.TblAqarCommissions AS DueCommissions
            INNER JOIN dbo.Notes AS DueNotes
                ON DueNotes.NoteID = DueCommissions.NoteID
            LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TBLSalesRepData AS DueSalesRepData
                ON DueSalesRepData.EmpID = DueCommissions.EmpID
            LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai AS DueAqarDetai
                ON DueCommissions.IqarID = DueAqarDetai.Id
            LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.ContracttBillInstallmentsDone AS DuePayLine
                ON DuePayLine.NoteID = DueCommissions.NoteID
                AND DuePayLine.InstallNo = DueCommissions.PymentNo
            WHERE DueNotes.DueDate IS NOT NULL
                AND (@GroupID IS NULL OR DueSalesRepData.GroupID = @GroupID)
                AND (@BranchID IS NULL OR DueNotes.branch_no = @BranchID)
                AND (@IqarID IS NULL OR DueCommissions.IqarID = @IqarID)
                AND (@EmpID IS NULL OR DueSalesRepData.EmpID = @EmpID)
                AND (@UnitTypeID IS NULL OR DueAqarDetai.unittype = @UnitTypeID)
                AND (@UnitID IS NULL OR DueAqarDetai.Id = @UnitID)
                AND (@TypeAmount IS NULL OR DueCommissions.TypeAmount = @TypeAmount)
                AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR DueNotes.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
                AND (@ToDate IS NULL OR DueNotes.NoteDate <= @ToDate)
                AND DueCommissions.PymentNo = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.PymentNo
                AND DueCommissions.TypeOper = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeOper
                AND DueCommissions.TypeAmount = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeAmount
                AND DueCommissions.ContNo = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ContNo
                AND DueCommissions.IqarID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID
                AND DueCommissions.EmpID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.EmpID
                AND ISNULL(DuePayLine.istallid, -DueCommissions.ID) = ISNULL(MAX(ContractPay.istallid), -MIN(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ID))
            FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
        ).value('.', 'nvarchar(max)'), 1, 3, '') AS DtpChequeDueDates,
        MIN(dbo.TblContractInstallments.Installdate) AS InstallmentDueDates,
        MIN(dbo.Notes.Remark) AS Remark
    FROM dbo.TblEmployee
    RIGHT OUTER JOIN dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups
    RIGHT OUTER JOIN dbo.Notes
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblAqrEarnest
        ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.TblAqrEarnest.NoteID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblCustemers
        ON dbo.Notes.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData
        ON dbo.Notes.branch_no = dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_id
    RIGHT OUTER JOIN dbo.TBLSalesRepData
    RIGHT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblAqarCommissions
        ON dbo.TBLSalesRepData.EmpID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.EmpID
        ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.NoteID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblAqar
    RIGHT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblAqarDetai
        ON dbo.TblAqar.Aqarid = dbo.TblAqarDetai.Aqarid
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblAkarUnit
        ON dbo.TblAqarDetai.unittype = dbo.TblAkarUnit.id
        ON dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID = dbo.TblAqarDetai.Id
        ON dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.id = dbo.TBLSalesRepData.GroupID
        ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.TBLSalesRepData.EmpID
    LEFT OUTER JOIN ContractPay
        ON ContractPay.NoteID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.NoteID
        AND ContractPay.InstallNo = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.PymentNo
    LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblContractInstallments
        ON dbo.TblContractInstallments.id = ContractPay.istallid
    WHERE (@GroupID IS NULL OR dbo.TBLSalesRepData.GroupID = @GroupID)
        AND (@BranchID IS NULL OR dbo.Notes.branch_no = @BranchID)
        AND (@IqarID IS NULL OR dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID = @IqarID)
        AND (@EmpID IS NULL OR dbo.TBLSalesRepData.EmpID = @EmpID)
        AND (@UnitTypeID IS NULL OR dbo.TblAqarDetai.unittype = @UnitTypeID)
        AND (@UnitID IS NULL OR dbo.TblAqarDetai.Id = @UnitID)
        AND (@TypeAmount IS NULL OR dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeAmount = @TypeAmount)
        AND (@FromDate IS NULL OR dbo.Notes.NoteDate >= @FromDate)
        AND (@ToDate IS NULL OR dbo.Notes.NoteDate <= @ToDate)
        AND NOT
        (
            ContractPay.istallid IS NULL
            AND EXISTS
            (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dbo.ContracttBillInstallmentsDone AS ExistingPayLine
                WHERE ExistingPayLine.NoteID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.NoteID
            )
        )
    GROUP BY
        ISNULL(ContractPay.istallid, -dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ID),
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.PymentNo,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeOper,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeAmount,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ContNo,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID,
        dbo.TblAqarCommissions.EmpID
    ORDER BY
        MIN(CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(dbo.Notes.NoteSerial1) = 1 THEN CONVERT(float, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial1) ELSE 0 END),
        MIN(dbo.Notes.NoteSerial1),
        MIN(dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ID);
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_Get_AccountLedger_ReportData
    @AccountCodes         NVARCHAR(MAX),      -- CSV
    @StartDate            DATE,
    @EndDate              DATE,
    @BranchID             INT         = 0,
    @ActivityId           INT         = 0,
    @RegionID             INT         = 0,
    @ProjectID            INT         = 0,
    @NotesType            FLOAT       = 0,
    @ShowHiddenInvoices   BIT         = 1,    -- 1=show hidden, 0=hide
    @IsDetailedReport     BIT         = 0,    -- 1=with item details
    @IncludeSeedRow       BIT         = 1,    -- (لن تُستخدم)
    @ComputeOpeningInSP   BIT         = 1,    -- (لن تُستخدم)
    @OpeningMode          TINYINT     = 1     -- (لن يُستخدم)
	,@Debug        BIT = 0,               -- يطبع بلوكات تشخيص
@DebugAccount NVARCHAR(50) = NULL    -- حساب للتركيز (اختياري)

AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    /* 0) حساب تاريخ الافتتاح: أقرب Opening <= @StartDate من TblyearsData */
 

    /* 1) قائمة الحسابات */
  IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Acc') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Acc;
CREATE TABLE #Acc (
  Account_Code NVARCHAR(50) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT PRIMARY KEY
);

INSERT INTO #Acc(Account_Code)
SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(Item)) COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
FROM dbo.fn_SplitString(@AccountCodes, N',');


    /* 2) كل بيانات التقرير من RptLedger_Sub (بدون فلتر التاريخ) */
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#BaseAll') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #BaseAll;
    SELECT
        R.Account_Code,
        R.RecordDate AS RecordDateX,
        CASE WHEN R.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN R.DEV_Value ELSE -R.DEV_Value END AS ValueSigned,

        R.ChqueNum, R.ManualNo, R.RecordDateH, R.Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID,
        R.DEV_Value, R.Credit_Or_Debit, R.DEV_DES, R.DevDESE, R.Account_Name,
        R.DEV_ID_Line_No, R.NotesTypeName, R.UserID, R.UserName,
        R.ReceiptID, R.Notes_ID, R.OperaID, R.Transaction_ID, R.Transaction_Serial,
        R.Transaction_Date, R.Posted, R.TransactionTypeName, R.PostedDate, R.PostedUserID,
        R.Account_Interval_ID, R.NoteDate, R.NoteType, R.NoteSerial, R.Note_Value,
        R.Account_Serial, R.Account_NameEng, R.Parent_Account_Code, R.Branch,
        R.Sum_account, R.cost_center, R.currenct_code, R.Remark,
        R.note_value_by_characters, R.foxy_no, R.DEV_ID_Line_No1, R.project_id,
        R.NotesTypeNamee, R.TransactionEnglishName, R.opr_fullcode, R.NoteSerial1,
        R.branch_id, R.ActivityTypeId,

        A.opening_balance AS OB_Stored,
        A.opening_balance_type,

        R.notes_all, R.DEV_ValueE, R.currency, R.rate, R.Name, R.NameE,
        R.branch_name, R.branch_namee, R.RegionID, R.DescAccount
    INTO #BaseAll
    FROM dbo.RptLedger_Sub R
    JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A ON A.Account_Code COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = R.Account_Code COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
WHERE R.Account_Code COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT IN (SELECT Account_Code FROM #Acc)
      AND (@ShowHiddenInvoices = 1 OR ISNULL(R.IsHiddenInv,0) = 0)
      AND (@BranchID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.branch_id,0)      = @BranchID)
      AND (@ActivityId = 0 OR ISNULL(R.ActivityTypeId,0) = @ActivityId)
      AND (@RegionID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.RegionID,0)       = @RegionID)
      AND (@ProjectID  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.project_id,0)     = @ProjectID)
      AND (@NotesType  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.NoteType,0)       = @NotesType);

    /* 3) الافتتاح: مباشرة من الجداول (بدون دوال) */
    -- 3.a) قيود الافتتاح في يوم @OBDate من جدول DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1
 /* === 0) حدّد تاريخ الافتتاح من TblyearsData لنفس سنة التقرير === */

 /* ============== 3) افتتاح فعلي لكل حساب ============== */

/* أقدم تاريخ افتتاح عام قبل بداية الفترة (fallback) */
DECLARE @MinOB date =
(
    SELECT MIN(OpeneingbalancesDate)
    FROM dbo.TblyearsData
    WHERE OpeneingbalancesDate <= @StartDate
);
IF @MinOB IS NULL SET @MinOB = @StartDate;


/* لكل حساب: آخر تاريخ افتتاح فعلي في V1 <= @StartDate  */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB_DATE') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB_DATE;
SELECT
    A.Account_Code,
    OBDate = COALESCE( OA.OBDate, @MinOB )
INTO #OB_DATE
FROM #Acc X
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A
  ON A.Account_Code = X.Account_Code
OUTER APPLY
(
    SELECT MAX(V.RecordDate) AS OBDate
    FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 V
    WHERE ( (A.last_account = 1 AND V.Account_Code = A.Account_Code)
         OR (A.last_account <> 1 AND V.Account_Code LIKE A.Account_Code + 'a%') )
      AND (V.Posted IS NULL OR V.Posted = 0)
      AND V.RecordDate <= @StartDate
) OA;
/* DEBUG 1: مبدئي */
IF @Debug = 1
BEGIN
  PRINT '=== DEBUG 1 ===';
  PRINT 'StartDate = ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), @StartDate, 120);
  PRINT 'EndDate   = ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), @EndDate, 120);
  PRINT 'MinOB     = ' + CONVERT(varchar(10), @MinOB, 120);

  -- كل حساب وتاريخ الافتتاح اللي اتلقط
  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_DATE' AS dbg, Account_Code, OBDate
  FROM #OB_DATE
  ORDER BY Account_Code;

  -- لو حددت حساب، وريني القيود الافتتاحية الفعلية في اليوم ده
  IF @DebugAccount IS NOT NULL
  BEGIN
    SELECT 'V1 rows at OBDate' AS dbg, V.*
    FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 V
    JOIN #OB_DATE D
      ON V.RecordDate = D.OBDate
     AND (V.Account_Code = @DebugAccount OR V.Account_Code LIKE @DebugAccount + 'a%')
    WHERE D.Account_Code = @DebugAccount;
  END
END

/* رصيد الافتتاح من جدول الافتتاحيات في يوم OBDate لكل حساب */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB_OPEN') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB_OPEN;
SELECT
    D.Account_Code,
    OpeningFromOB = ISNULL(
        SUM(CASE WHEN V.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN V.value ELSE -V.value END), 0
    )
INTO #OB_OPEN
FROM #OB_DATE D
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A
  ON A.Account_Code = D.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 V
  ON V.RecordDate = D.OBDate
 AND ( (A.last_account = 1 AND V.Account_Code = A.Account_Code)
    OR (A.last_account <> 1 AND V.Account_Code LIKE A.Account_Code + 'a%') )
 AND (V.Posted IS NULL OR V.Posted = 0)
GROUP BY D.Account_Code;

/* حركة من بعد OBDate ولحد قبل StartDate */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB_MOV') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB_MOV;
SELECT
    D.Account_Code,
    OpeningFromMoves = ISNULL(
        SUM(CASE WHEN R.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN R.DEV_Value ELSE -R.DEV_Value END), 0
    )
INTO #OB_MOV
FROM #OB_DATE D
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A
  ON A.Account_Code = D.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN dbo.RptLedger_Sub R
  ON R.RecordDate > D.OBDate    -- بعد قيد الافتتاح
 AND R.RecordDate < @StartDate  -- قبل بداية الفترة
 AND ( (A.last_account = 1 AND R.Account_Code = A.Account_Code)
    OR (A.last_account <> 1 AND R.Account_Code LIKE A.Account_Code + 'a%') )
 AND (@ShowHiddenInvoices = 1 OR ISNULL(R.IsHiddenInv,0) = 0)
 AND (@BranchID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.branch_id,0)      = @BranchID)
 AND (@ActivityId = 0 OR ISNULL(R.ActivityTypeId,0) = @ActivityId)
 AND (@RegionID   = 0 OR ISNULL(R.RegionID,0)       = @RegionID)
 AND (@ProjectID  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.project_id,0)     = @ProjectID)
 AND (@NotesType  = 0 OR ISNULL(R.NoteType,0)       = @NotesType)
GROUP BY D.Account_Code;
/* DEBUG 2: الافتتاح + الحركة قبل الفترة */
IF @Debug = 1
BEGIN
  PRINT '=== DEBUG 2 ===';

  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_OPEN' AS dbg, * FROM #OB_OPEN ORDER BY Account_Code;
  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_MOV'  AS dbg, * FROM #OB_MOV  ORDER BY Account_Code;

  IF @DebugAccount IS NOT NULL
  BEGIN
    -- تفاصيل الحركة قبل الفترة للحساب المحدد
    SELECT 'Moves before StartDate' AS dbg, R.*
    FROM dbo.RptLedger_Sub R
    WHERE R.RecordDate >
            (SELECT OBDate FROM #OB_DATE WHERE Account_Code = @DebugAccount)
      AND R.RecordDate < @StartDate
      AND (R.Account_Code = @DebugAccount OR R.Account_Code LIKE @DebugAccount + 'a%');
  END
END

/* الرصيد الافتتاحي النهائي لكل حساب = افتتاح + حركة قبل الفترة */
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#OB') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #OB;
SELECT
    A.Account_Code,
    OpeningBalance = ISNULL(O1.OpeningFromOB,0) + ISNULL(O2.OpeningFromMoves,0)
INTO #OB
FROM #Acc X
JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A ON A.Account_Code = X.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN #OB_OPEN O1 ON O1.Account_Code = A.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN #OB_MOV  O2 ON O2.Account_Code = A.Account_Code;
/* DEBUG 3: الرصيد الافتتاحي النهائي */
IF @Debug = 1
BEGIN
  PRINT '=== DEBUG 3 ===';
  SELECT TOP (200) 'OB_FINAL' AS dbg, * FROM #OB ORDER BY Account_Code;

  IF @DebugAccount IS NOT NULL
  BEGIN
    SELECT 'OB of DebugAccount' AS dbg, * FROM #OB WHERE Account_Code = @DebugAccount;
  END
END

        COALESCE(OB.OpeningBalance, B.OB_Stored, 0) AS OpeningBalance
    FROM #InRange B
    LEFT JOIN #OB OB ON OB.Account_Code = B.Account_Code
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Transactions TR   ON TR.Transaction_ID = B.Transaction_ID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblCustemers C    ON C.CusID = TR.CusID
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblEmployee  E    ON E.Account_Code = B.Account_Code
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Transaction_Details TD ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND TD.Transaction_ID = B.Transaction_ID)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.Transactions        TR2 ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND TR2.Transaction_ID = B.Transaction_ID)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TransactionTypes    TT  ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND TT.Transaction_Type = TR2.Transaction_Type)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblItems            Itm ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND Itm.ItemID = TD.Item_ID)
    LEFT JOIN dbo.TblUnites           U   ON (@IsDetailedReport=1 AND U.UnitID   = TD.UnitId);

    /* 8) إخراج مرتّب: السطر الافتتاحي يطلع أول حاجة لكل حساب */
