        CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(NoteSerial1) = 1 THEN CAST(NoteSerial1 AS BIGINT) ELSE 0 END,
        DEV_ID_Line_No;

    /* تنظيف */
    DROP TABLE #Main;
    DROP TABLE #InRange;
    DROP TABLE #OB;
    --DROP TABLE #MOVES;
    --DROP TABLE #OB_ONLY;
    DROP TABLE #BaseAll;
    DROP TABLE #Acc;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_GetBranchQRInfo
    @BranchID INT
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @ApplyEinvoiceWithBranch BIT

    SELECT @ApplyEinvoiceWithBranch = ApplyEinvoiceWithBranch 
    FROM tbloptions

    SELECT
        BB.branch_namee,

        ActivityName = 
            CASE 
                WHEN @ApplyEinvoiceWithBranch = 1 
                    THEN BB.branch_namee

                WHEN NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(TA.namee)), '') IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN TA.namee 

                ELSE BB.branch_namee 
            END,

        VATRegNo = 
            CASE 
                WHEN NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(TA.VATRegNo)), '') IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN TA.VATRegNo 
                ELSE BB.VATRegNo 
            END

    FROM TblBranchesData AS BB
    LEFT JOIN tblActivitesType AS TA 
        ON TA.id = BB.ActivityTypeId
    WHERE BB.branch_id = @BranchID;

END

    -- هذه الباراميترات تأتي من كود الفيجوال بيسك (بيانات الشركة)

        SellerNameAr = @SellerNameAr, 
        RegNoComCom2 = @RegNoCom,            -- (لاحظ أن اسم الحقل هنا غريب)
        VatregestriationnumberCom = @Vatregestriationnumber, 

        -- باقي الحقول من الجداول
        dbo.tblEInvoice.ID, dbo.tblEInvoice.InvoiceID, tblEInvoice.IqarName,

        dbo.tblEInvoice.ErrorMessageS, dbo.tblEInvoice.IssueDate, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.IssueTim, dbo.tblEInvoice.DocumentCurrencyCode, 
        tblEInvoice.NewNO, tblEInvoice.ComResid, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.TaxCurrencyCode, dbo.tblEInvoice.StreetName, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.BuildingNumber, dbo.tblEInvoice.CityName, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.PostalZone, dbo.tblEInvoice.CitySubdivisionName, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.RegistrationName, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.InvoiceID as NoteSerial11, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.CompanyID, dbo.tblEInvoice.CoCRCode, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.PayableAmount, dbo.tblEInvoice.VatValue, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.Id700, dbo.tblEInvoice.serial, dbo.tblEInvoice.ExcelRow, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.ExcelFile, dbo.tblEInvoice.QrCodeData, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.QrCodeDataPath, dbo.tblEInvoice.QrCodeImage, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.zatcaStatus, dbo.tblEInvoice.InvoiceTypeCodeID, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.InvoiceTypeCodename, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.AdditionalDocumentReferencePIH, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.InvoiceDocumentReferenceID, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.AdditionalDocumentReferenceICVUUID, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.ActualDeliveryDate, dbo.tblEInvoice.LatestDeliveryDate, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.RecTime, dbo.tblEInvoice.Transaction_ID, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.warrningmessage, dbo.tblEInvoice.PaymentMeansCode, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.InstructionNote, dbo.tblEInvoice.Iban, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.paymentnote, dbo.tblEInvoice.AdditionalStreetName, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.PlotIdentification, dbo.tblEInvoice.CountrySubentity, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.IdentificationCode, dbo.tblEInvoice.last_changed, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.Identificationid, dbo.tblEInvoice.schemeID, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.TaxCategoryPercent, dbo.tblEInvoice.TaxCategoryID, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.Export, dbo.tblEInvoice.branch_id, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.branch_name, dbo.tblEInvoice.branchname, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice.GroupUniqueCode, dbo.tblEInvoice.GroupUniqueFileMaster, 
        
        -- حقول من الجدول الثاني
        dbo.tblEInvoice2.ItemName, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice2.Price,  -- (تم حذف التكرار الذي كان هنا)
        dbo.tblEInvoice2.Qty, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice2.PayableAmount AS PayableAmount2, 
        dbo.tblEInvoice2.VatValue  VatValue2
        
        -- (تم حذف الجزء المكرر من إدخال بيانات الشركة الذي كان في نهاية الكويري)
        
    FROM 
        tblEInvoice 
        LEFT OUTER JOIN tblEInvoice2 ON tblEInvoice.InvoiceID = tblEInvoice2.InvoiceID
    WHERE 
        -- الاستعلام الآمن باستخدام الباراميتر
        (dbo.tblEInvoice.InvoiceID = @InvoiceID);
END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_FullDbMaintenance
(
      @RebuildThreshold   FLOAT = 30    -- لو الفراجمنتشن >= القيمة دي: REBUILD
    , @ReorganizeFrom     FLOAT = 5     -- من القيمة دي لحد الحد الأعلى: REORGANIZE
    , @MinPageCount       INT   = 100   -- تجاهل الإندكسات الصغيرة أقل من كذا صفحة
    , @TopMissingIndexes  INT   = 50    -- عدد صفوف ريبورت الـ Missing Indexes
    , @TopQueries         INT   = 20    -- عدد صفوف ريبورت الـ Top Queries
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    PRINT '===============================================';
    PRINT 'بدء صيانة الداتا بيز: ' + DB_NAME();
    PRINT 'التاريخ/الوقت: ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR(30), GETDATE(), 120);
    PRINT '===============================================';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 1) صيانة الإندكسات (Rebuild / Reorganize)
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 1: حساب الفراجمنتشن وصيانة الإندكسات...';

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Frag') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Frag;

    SELECT 
          t.name      AS TableName
        , s.name      AS SchemaName
        , i.name      AS IndexName
        , ips.index_id
        , ips.avg_fragmentation_in_percent AS FragPercent
        , ips.page_count
    INTO #Frag
    FROM sys.dm_db_index_physical_stats(DB_ID(), NULL, NULL, NULL, 'SAMPLED') ips
    JOIN sys.indexes i   ON ips.object_id = i.object_id AND ips.index_id = i.index_id
    JOIN sys.tables t    ON t.object_id  = i.object_id
    JOIN sys.schemas s   ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
    WHERE 
        i.type IN (1,2)              -- clustered, nonclustered
        AND ips.page_count >= @MinPageCount
        AND t.is_ms_shipped = 0;

    DECLARE 
          @TableName   SYSNAME
        , @SchemaName  SYSNAME
        , @IndexName   SYSNAME
        , @IndexId     INT
        , @Frag        FLOAT
        , @SQL         NVARCHAR(MAX);

    DECLARE curIndexes CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
        SELECT TableName, SchemaName, IndexName, index_id, FragPercent
        FROM #Frag
        WHERE FragPercent >= @ReorganizeFrom
        ORDER BY FragPercent DESC;

    OPEN curIndexes;
    FETCH NEXT FROM curIndexes INTO @TableName, @SchemaName, @IndexName, @IndexId, @Frag;

    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        IF @Frag >= @RebuildThreshold
        BEGIN
            -- REBUILD
            SET @SQL = N'ALTER INDEX [' + @IndexName + N'] ON [' + @SchemaName + N'].[' + @TableName + N'] REBUILD;';
        END
        ELSE
        BEGIN
            -- REORGANIZE
            SET @SQL = N'ALTER INDEX [' + @IndexName + N'] ON [' + @SchemaName + N'].[' + @TableName + N'] REORGANIZE;';
        END

        PRINT @SQL;

        BEGIN TRY
            EXEC (@SQL);
        END TRY
        BEGIN CATCH
            PRINT 'خطأ أثناء صيانة الإندكس: ' 
                  + ISNULL(@SchemaName,'') + '.' + ISNULL(@TableName,'') 
                  + ' - ' + ISNULL(@IndexName,'')
                  + ' => ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        END CATCH;

        FETCH NEXT FROM curIndexes INTO @TableName, @SchemaName, @IndexName, @IndexId, @Frag;
    END

    CLOSE curIndexes;
    DEALLOCATE curIndexes;

    PRINT 'انتهاء خطوة صيانة الإندكسات.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 2) تحديث الإحصائيات UPDATE STATISTICS
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 2: تحديث الإحصائيات لكل الجداول...';

    DECLARE @FullTableName SYSNAME;

    DECLARE curTables CURSOR LOCAL FAST_FORWARD FOR
        SELECT QUOTENAME(s.name) + '.' + QUOTENAME(t.name)
        FROM sys.tables t
        JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
        WHERE t.is_ms_shipped = 0;

    OPEN curTables;
    FETCH NEXT FROM curTables INTO @FullTableName;

    WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
    BEGIN
        SET @SQL = N'UPDATE STATISTICS ' + @FullTableName + ' WITH FULLSCAN;';
        PRINT @SQL;

        BEGIN TRY
            EXEC (@SQL);
        END TRY
        BEGIN CATCH
            PRINT 'خطأ أثناء تحديث الإحصائيات للجدول: ' 
                  + @FullTableName + ' => ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        END CATCH;

        FETCH NEXT FROM curTables INTO @FullTableName;
    END

    CLOSE curTables;
    DEALLOCATE curTables;

    PRINT 'انتهاء خطوة تحديث الإحصائيات.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 3) ريبورت الاقتراحات: Missing Indexes
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 3: عرض اقتراحات الإندكسات الناقصة (Missing Indexes)...';

    SELECT TOP (@TopMissingIndexes)
          DatabaseName      = DB_NAME(mid.database_id)
        , SchemaName       = OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id)
        , TableName        = OBJECT_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id)
        , TotalReads       = (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans)
        , ImprovementEstimate = migs.avg_total_user_cost * (migs.user_seeks + migs.user_scans)
        , mid.equality_columns
        , mid.inequality_columns
        , mid.included_columns
        , CreateIndexStatement =
            'CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_Auto_' 
            + REPLACE(OBJECT_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id), ' ', '_')
            + '_' + CAST(migs.group_handle AS VARCHAR(10))
            + ' ON [' + OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id) + '].['
            + OBJECT_NAME(mid.object_id, mid.database_id) + ']'
            + ' (' 
                + ISNULL(mid.equality_columns,'')
                + CASE 
                    WHEN mid.equality_columns IS NOT NULL 
                         AND mid.inequality_columns IS NOT NULL 
                    THEN ',' ELSE '' END
                + ISNULL(mid.inequality_columns,'')
              + ')'
            + CASE 
                WHEN mid.included_columns IS NOT NULL 
                THEN ' INCLUDE (' + mid.included_columns + ')' 
                ELSE '' 
              END
    FROM sys.dm_db_missing_index_group_stats AS migs
    JOIN sys.dm_db_missing_index_groups       AS mig  ON migs.group_handle = mig.index_group_handle
    JOIN sys.dm_db_missing_index_details      AS mid  ON mig.index_handle  = mid.index_handle
    WHERE mid.database_id = DB_ID()
    ORDER BY ImprovementEstimate DESC;

    PRINT 'انتهاء ريبورت Missing Indexes.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 4) ريبورت الإندكسات غير المستخدمة (مرشحة للمراجعة)
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 4: عرض الإندكسات غير المستخدمة تقريبًا...';

    ;WITH IndexUsage AS
    (
        SELECT 
              SchemaName   = s.name
            , TableName    = t.name
            , IndexName    = i.name
            , i.index_id
            , i.is_primary_key
            , i.is_unique
            , user_seeks   = COALESCE(us.user_seeks,0)
            , user_scans   = COALESCE(us.user_scans,0)
            , user_lookups = COALESCE(us.user_lookups,0)
            , user_updates = COALESCE(us.user_updates,0)
            , total_reads  = COALESCE(us.user_seeks,0)
                            + COALESCE(us.user_scans,0)
                            + COALESCE(us.user_lookups,0)
        FROM sys.indexes i
        JOIN sys.tables t   ON t.object_id = i.object_id
        JOIN sys.schemas s  ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id
        LEFT JOIN sys.dm_db_index_usage_stats us
            ON us.object_id = i.object_id
           AND us.index_id  = i.index_id
           AND us.database_id = DB_ID()
        WHERE 
            t.is_ms_shipped = 0
            AND i.type_desc <> 'HEAP'
    )
    SELECT 
          SchemaName
        , TableName
        , IndexName
        , user_seeks
        , user_scans
        , user_lookups
        , user_updates
        , total_reads
    FROM IndexUsage
    WHERE 
        total_reads = 0    -- مفيش قراءات تقريبًا
        AND user_updates > 0
        AND is_primary_key = 0
        AND is_unique      = 0
    ORDER BY user_updates DESC;

    PRINT 'انتهاء ريبورت الإندكسات غير المستخدمة.';
    PRINT '-----------------------------------------------';

    ------------------------------------------------
    -- 5) ريبورت الاستعلامات التقيلة (Top Expensive Queries)
    ------------------------------------------------
    PRINT 'الخطوة 5: عرض أكثر الاستعلامات تكلفة...';

    SELECT TOP (@TopQueries)
          AvgDuration_ms   = qs.total_elapsed_time / qs.execution_count
        , qs.execution_count
        , AvgLogicalReads  = qs.total_logical_reads / qs.execution_count
        , AvgCPU           = qs.total_worker_time / qs.execution_count
        , DatabaseName     = DB_NAME(st.dbid)
        , SchemaName       = OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(st.objectid, st.dbid)
        , ObjectName       = OBJECT_NAME(st.objectid, st.dbid)
        , QueryText        = SUBSTRING(
                                st.text,
                                (qs.statement_start_offset/2)+1,
                                ((CASE qs.statement_end_offset
                                    WHEN -1 THEN DATALENGTH(st.text)
                                    ELSE qs.statement_end_offset
                                  END - qs.statement_start_offset)/2)+1
                             )
    FROM sys.dm_exec_query_stats qs
    CROSS APPLY sys.dm_exec_sql_text(qs.sql_handle) st
    WHERE DB_NAME(st.dbid) = DB_NAME()
    ORDER BY AvgDuration_ms DESC;

    PRINT 'انتهاء ريبورت Top Queries.';
    PRINT '===============================================';
    PRINT 'انتهاء ستورد بروسيجر الصيانة الكاملة للداتا بيز.';
    PRINT '===============================================';

END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_TrialBalanceLevels
(
    @FromDate  DATETIME,
    @ToDate    DATETIME,

    @OpeningBalanceDate DATETIME,   -- openingBalanceDate (بداية الفترة)
    @StartCurrentDate   DATETIME,   -- StartCurrentDate (بداية السنة)

    @BranchID INT = NULL,           -- لو فرع واحد
    @BranchList NVARCHAR(MAX) = NULL, -- CSV للفروع (Activity/Region)

    @AccountSerial NVARCHAR(50) = NULL,  -- TxtAccountCode.text

    @HideZeroBalance BIT = 0,
    @HideLastAccount BIT = 0,

    @AccountLevel INT = 0,          -- account_level
    @OnlyLevel BIT = 0              -- ShowOnlyLevelAcc (Yes=>OnlyLevel)
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    ;WITH BranchFilter AS (
        SELECT Item AS BranchID
        FROM dbo.SplitInts(@BranchList)
    ),
    VSummary AS (
        SELECT
            d.Account_Code,

            DebitBal  = SUM(CASE 
                               WHEN d.Credit_Or_Debit = 0
                                AND d.RecordDate >= @FromDate AND d.RecordDate <= @ToDate
                               THEN d.Value ELSE 0 END),

            -- سالب زي منطقك (Credit_Or_Debit=1 => -Value)
            CreditBal = SUM(CASE 
                               WHEN d.Credit_Or_Debit = 1
                                AND d.RecordDate >= @FromDate AND d.RecordDate <= @ToDate
                               THEN -d.Value ELSE 0 END),

            OpeningBefore_FromMinus1 =
                SUM(CASE 
                        WHEN d.RecordDate >= @OpeningBalanceDate
                         AND d.RecordDate <  @FromDate
                        THEN CASE WHEN d.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN d.Value ELSE -d.Value END
                        ELSE 0
                    END),

            Opening_FromStartYear_ToFrom =
                SUM(CASE
                        WHEN d.RecordDate >= @StartCurrentDate
                         AND d.RecordDate <  @FromDate
                        THEN CASE WHEN d.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN d.Value ELSE -d.Value END
                        ELSE 0
                    END)
        FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS d
        WHERE d.Posted IS NULL
          AND (
                @BranchID IS NULL OR d.branch_id = @BranchID
              )
          AND (
                @BranchList IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@BranchList)) = ''
                OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM BranchFilter bf WHERE bf.BranchID = d.branch_id)
              )
        GROUP BY d.Account_Code
    ),
    OSummary AS (
        SELECT
            o.Account_Code,
            OpeningBal = SUM(CASE WHEN o.Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN o.Value ELSE -o.Value END)
        FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS1 o
        WHERE o.Posted IS NULL
          AND (
                @BranchID IS NULL OR o.branch_id = @BranchID
              )
          AND (
                @BranchList IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@BranchList)) = ''
                OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM BranchFilter bf WHERE bf.BranchID = o.branch_id)
              )
        GROUP BY o.Account_Code
    ),

    -- (Ancestor, Descendant) لكل حساب: يصعد للأب حتى root
    Up AS (
        SELECT
            Descendant = CAST(a.Account_Code AS VARCHAR(255)),
            Ancestor   = CAST(a.Account_Code AS VARCHAR(255)),
            Depth      = 0
        FROM dbo.ACCOUNTS a

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            u.Descendant,
            CAST(p.Parent_Account_Code AS VARCHAR(255)) AS Ancestor,
            u.Depth + 1
        FROM Up u
        JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS p ON p.Account_Code = u.Ancestor
        WHERE p.Parent_Account_Code IS NOT NULL
          AND p.Parent_Account_Code <> 'r'
          AND u.Depth < 50
    ),

    Rollup AS (
        SELECT
            u.Ancestor AS Account_Code,

            DebitBal  = SUM(ISNULL(v.DebitBal,0)),
            CreditBal = SUM(ISNULL(v.CreditBal,0)),
            OpeningBal = SUM(ISNULL(o.OpeningBal,0)),
            OpeningBefore_FromMinus1 = SUM(ISNULL(v.OpeningBefore_FromMinus1,0)),
            Opening_FromStartYear_ToFrom = SUM(ISNULL(v.Opening_FromStartYear_ToFrom,0))
        FROM Up u
        LEFT JOIN VSummary v ON v.Account_Code = u.Descendant
        LEFT JOIN OSummary o ON o.Account_Code = u.Descendant
        GROUP BY u.Ancestor
    )

    SELECT
        A.last_account,
        A.ProfitBalance,
        A.Parent_Account_Code,
        A.AccountTypes,
        A.Account_Code,
        A.Account_Serial,
        A.Account_Name,
        A.Account_NameEng,
        A.[Level],

        debitBalance  = ISNULL(R.DebitBal,0),
        CreditBalance = ISNULL(R.CreditBal,0), -- سالب
        OpeningBalance = ISNULL(R.OpeningBal,0),
        OpeningBalancebeformdateMinus1 = ISNULL(R.OpeningBefore_FromMinus1,0),
        OpeningBalancebeformStartCurrentyearTOFromDAteminus1 = ISNULL(R.Opening_FromStartYear_ToFrom,0)

    FROM dbo.ACCOUNTS A
    LEFT JOIN Rollup R ON R.Account_Code = A.Account_Code
    WHERE 1=1
      AND (@HideLastAccount = 0 OR A.last_account = 0)
      AND (@AccountSerial IS NULL OR @AccountSerial = '' OR A.Account_Serial = @AccountSerial)

      AND (
            @AccountLevel = 0
            OR (
                (@OnlyLevel = 1 AND A.[Level] = @AccountLevel)
             OR (@OnlyLevel = 0 AND A.[Level] <= @AccountLevel)
            )
          )

      AND (
            @HideZeroBalance = 0
            OR (
                ISNULL(R.DebitBal,0) <> 0
             OR ISNULL(R.CreditBal,0) <> 0
             OR ISNULL(R.OpeningBal,0) <> 0
             OR ISNULL(R.OpeningBefore_FromMinus1,0) <> 0
             OR ISNULL(R.Opening_FromStartYear_ToFrom,0) <> 0
            )
          )

      -- نفس منطقك: يظهر الأباء حتى لو صفر (علشان الشجرة)
      OR A.last_account = 0

    ORDER BY A.Account_Serial
    OPTION (MAXRECURSION 32767, RECOMPILE);
END
